tools.name: list_pois
tools.title: List points of interest
tools.description: List points of interest from the Aran Wanderer field guide. Optionally filter by island (Inishmore, Inishmaan, Inisheer) or icon type (e.g. holy_well, fort_dun, beach_strand).

island.description: Restrict results to a single Aran island.

icon_type.description: Restrict to an icon type such as holy_well, fort_dun, beach_strand, church_monastic, cliff_coast, village_settlement, pub_amenity, natural_feature, airport, castle_ruin.

limit.description: Max number of results to return. Defaults to all matches.

tools.name: search_pois
tools.title: Search points of interest
tools.description: Full-text search over Aran Islands POIs. Matches against name, cluster, description, folklore, and nature notes.

query.description: Search term to match against POI text fields.

tools.name: get_poi
tools.title: Get a point of interest
tools.description: Return the full field-guide entry for a POI by (case-insensitive) name match, including description, folklore, nature notes, coordinates, and image credits.

name.description: POI name or a distinctive substring of it.
